title: charset coverage across every surface
manager: Make Unicode work uniformly across the four places text lives in a machine: machine/state properties, error messages, and the input and output tapes. Today one surface may accept a codepoint another mangles; this closes the gap so a non-ASCII name behaves the same whether it's printed in a diagnostic, stored in a property, or streamed on a tape.
cs: folds fsl#1196 (error messages), fsl#1197 (input tape), fsl#1198 (output tape) into one cross-surface charset pass
